title: Cellular Resilience Advanced (Practitioner Guided)™
tagline: Advanced-dose cellular resilience support for qualified practitioner protocols
purpose: A high-potency, professionally-dosed formulation providing comprehensive cellular resilience support during periods of significant physiological demand. This formulation is intended for use only under the direct supervision of a qualified healthcare practitioner. It supports the body's natural adaptive and homeostatic mechanisms at levels appropriate for therapeutic nutritional protocols.
supports: Intensive antioxidant defense support during periods of significant physiological demand
Cellular homeostasis maintenance and normal mitochondrial membrane function
Healthy Nrf2 pathway activation within physiological parameters
Normal systemic inflammatory balance during physiologically demanding periods
Comprehensive cellular resilience terrain support as part of a practitioner-supervised protocol

dosing.note: Powder component dissolved in 8 oz. water with morning meal

safetyNotes: THIS FORMULATION IS INTENDED FOR USE ONLY UNDER THE DIRECT SUPERVISION OF A QUALIFIED, LICENSED HEALTHCARE PRACTITIONER.
Not for self-directed use. Dosing and duration must be determined by a qualified practitioner.
Not for use in pregnancy without explicit medical supervision.
Consult clinician regarding potential interactions with all medications, particularly anticoagulants, immunosuppressants, and oncology protocols.
Selenium toxicity is possible at doses exceeding 400 mcg/day; do not exceed practitioner-prescribed amounts.
Keep out of reach of children.
suitedFor: Individuals under the direct care of a qualified healthcare practitioner who has determined this level of support to be appropriate
Participants in formally supervised nutritional support programs
Those in consultation with practitioners experienced in therapeutic nutrition during periods of significant physiological demand
systemRole: This advanced module sits at the apex of the HTP System and is reserved for use within formally supervised protocols. It is not available for general purchase and requires practitioner authorization.
